docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2026 DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP) CONTINUED TO MAR-20-2026 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 505 - JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: DAMON CARTER; DEPT. 505 - MATTER NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-11-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 505

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2026, DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP) GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER - JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: DAMON CARTER; DEPT. 505 - PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 9:28AM AND CONCLUDING AT 9:37AM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARAH, MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, HECTOR $72,956.97 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $73,391.97, SEE SCANNED DOC
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-20-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 505
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-28-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
